medium.title: Word Frequency Analyzer
medium.description: Write function `clean_and_count(text)` returning word count dict (lowercased, punctuation removed).

hard.title: Custom Map Function
hard.description: Implement `my_map(func, iterable)` returning a list of results without using built-in `map()`.
hard.solution:
def my_map(func, iterable):
    return [func(item) for item in iterable]

debugging.title: Fix Missing Return Bug
debugging.description: Fix function returning None instead of result.
bugs: Missing `return` statement causes function to return `None`.
